name: KLA CORP
summary: KLA Corporation (KLAC) is a semiconductor capital equipment company that designs and manufactures process control and yield management solutions. The company provides inspection, metrology, and data analytics systems used in semiconductor manufacturing. KLA's products help chipmakers detect defects, measure critical dimensions, and optimize fabrication processes across advanced technology nodes and new materials.

products.name: Process Control Systems
products.description: Inspection and metrology equipment used in semiconductor fabrication to detect defects and measure critical dimensions.

products.name: Yield Management Solutions
products.description: Data analytics and software platforms that help semiconductor manufacturers optimize yield and fabrication processes.
